title: 5G Ultra rollout reaches regional Australia
excerpt: TelcoNow's 5G Ultra network now covers major regional centres including Ballarat, Bendigo, and Toowoomba — bringing gigabit speeds outside the capital cities.
author: TelcoNow Team

title: How to get the most out of your mobile data
excerpt: From background app refresh to streaming quality settings, these simple tweaks can save gigabytes every month without sacrificing the experience.
author: TelcoNow Team

title: Introducing TelcoNow Max — unlimited, unleashed
excerpt: Our new Max plan gives you truly unlimited data with no speed throttling, priority network access, and international calls to 20 countries.
author: TelcoNow Team
